title: European Commission launches MiCA review as global crypto regulatory landscape shifts
message_html: European Commission launches MiCA review as global crypto regulatory landscape shifts ...
snippet: The European Commission launched a MiCA consultation open through Aug. 31, asking whether the crypto framework needs updating.

title: Trump Orders Fed to Review Crypto Firms' Access to Master Accounts
message_html: Trump Orders Fed to Review Crypto Firms' Access to Master Accounts ...
snippet: The order asks the Fed to review crypto firms’ access to payment rails, putting its control over master accounts under scrutiny.
